source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 giu3 zou6
cards.english: My name is Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: ji4 keoi5 zau6 hai6 ngo5 sai3 lou2
cards.english: And he is my little brother, George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 zau6 hai6 zyu1 taai3 taai2
cards.english: She is Mummy Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 hai6 zyu1 sin1 saang1
cards.english: He is Daddy Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6
cards.english: I'm Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: san1 tai2 bat1 sik1
cards.english: [Feeling unwell]

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.characters: 豬太太同豬先生 啱啱整好Peppa同George嘅早餐
cards.jyutping: zyu1 taai3 taai2 tung4 zyu1 sin1 saang1 ngaam1 ngaam1 zing2 hou2 tung4 ge3 zou2 caan1
cards.english: Mummy Pig and Daddy Pig have just prepared Peppa and George's breakfast.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: zou2 caan1 zing2 hou2 zo2 laa3
cards.english: Breakfast is ready.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: min6 soeng6 bin6 jau5 di1 hung4 dim2 wo3
cards.english: Peppa has some red spots on her face.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.characters: 媽咪，我覺得有啲唔舒服啊
cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 ngo5 gok3 dak1 jau5 di1 m4 syu1 fuk6 aa3
cards.english: Mommy, I don't feel very well.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.characters: 今次弊喇，Peppa，你個樣唔多妥啊
cards.jyutping: gam1 ci3 bai6 laa3 nei5 go3 joeng6 m4 do1 to5 aa3
cards.english: Oh no, Peppa, you don't look good.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.characters: 唔使擔心，我打畀棕熊醫生
cards.jyutping: m4 sai2 daam1 sam1 ngo5 daa2 bei2 zung1 hung4 ji1 sang1
cards.english: Don't worry, I'll call Dr. Bear.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6 zung1 hung4 ji1 sang1 nei5 hou2
cards.english: This is Dr. Bear, hello?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: jau5 di1 m4 to5 aa3
cards.english: Peppa is not feeling well.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 sing4 faai3 min6 dou1 hai6 hung4 dim2 aa3
cards.english: Her whole face is covered in red spots.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: giu3 fan3 faan1 lok6 cong4 sin1
cards.english: Tell Peppa to go back to bed first.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.characters: 我而家即刻過嚟睇下佢吖
cards.jyutping: ngo5 ji4 gaa1 zik1 hak1 gwo3 lai2 tai2 haa6 keoi5 aa1
cards.english: I'll come over to see her right away.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: zung1 hung4 ji1 sang1 lai4 bong1 tai2 beng6
cards.english: Dr. Bear is here to see Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: nei5 hou2 maa1
cards.english: Peppa, how are you?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: nei5 gam1 jat6 gok3 dak1 dim2 aa3
cards.english: How are you feeling today?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 jau5 di1 m4 syu1 fuk6
cards.english: I'm feeling a bit unwell.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: maa4 faan4 nei5 san1 tiu4 lei6 ceot1 lei4 aa1
cards.english: Please stick your tongue out.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: m4 hai6 di1 me1 daai6 beng6 lai4 ge3
cards.english: It's nothing serious.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 zi2 hai6 ceot1 hung4 can2 ze1
cards.english: She just has a rash.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: si2 m4 sai2 sik6 joek6 gaa4
cards.english: Does she need to take medicine?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: di1 hung4 can2 hou2 faai3 wui6 ze6 gaa4 laa3
cards.english: The rash will go away quickly.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: bat1 gwo3 nei5 soeng2 ge3 waa2
cards.english: But, if you want,

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.characters: 我都可以開少少藥畀你食嘅
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dou1 ho2 ji5 hoi1 siu2 siu2 joek6 bei2 nei5 sik6 ge3
cards.english: I can prescribe some medicine for you.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: hou2 aa1 m4 goi1
cards.english: Okay, thank you

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.characters: 不過啲藥唔係咁好味㗎咋喎
cards.jyutping: bat1 gwo3 di1 joek6 m4 hai6 gam3 hou2 mei6 ga3 zaa3 wo3
cards.english: But the medicine doesn't taste very good.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: maak3 daai6 go3 hau2 aa1 m4 goi1
cards.english: Open your mouth wide, please.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: di1 joek6 hou2 naan4 jam2 aa3
cards.english: The medicine tastes awful!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.characters: 你肯飲藥，真係個好勇敢嘅小朋友啊
cards.jyutping: nei5 hang2 jam2 joek6 zan1 hai6 go3 hou2 jung5 gam2 ge3 siu2 pang4 jau5 aa3
cards.english: You're such a brave kid for taking the medicine.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: jiu3 hai2 cong4 dou6 jau1 sik1
cards.english: Peppa needs to rest in bed.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.characters: 我遲啲再返嚟睇下佢有冇好轉啦
cards.jyutping: ngo5 ci4 di1 zoi3 faan2 lai2 tai2 haa6 keoi5 jau5 mou5 hou2 zyun2 laa1
cards.english: I'll come back later to see if she's improved.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: ho2 ji5 jau5 jan4 lai4 taam3 keoi5 maa1
cards.english: Can someone visit her?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: ho2 ji5 ge2 taam3 keoi5 zyut6 deoi3 mou5 man6 tai4
cards.english: Yes, absolutely no problem with visiting her.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: hung4 can2 hai6 m4 wui6 cyun4 jim5 gaa4
cards.english: The rash isn't contagious.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: zoi3 gin3
cards.english: Goodbye.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: zoi3 gin3 laa3 zung1 hung4 ji1 sang1
cards.english: Goodbye, Dr. Brown Bear.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 ngo5 ho2 ji5 hei2 san1 maa1
cards.english: Mommy, can I get up?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.characters: 棕熊醫生頭先話 你要喺牀度休息㗎，Peppa
cards.jyutping: zung1 hung4 ji1 sang1 tau4 sin1 waa6 nei5 jiu3 hai2 cong4 dou6 jau1 sik1 gaa4
cards.english: Dr. Brown Bear said earlier that you need to rest in bed, Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 gam2 joeng2 wui6 hou2 mun6 gaa4
cards.english: But it's so boring this way.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.characters: 棕熊醫生話過可以有人嚟探你㗎
cards.jyutping: zung1 hung4 ji1 sang1 waa6 gwo3 ho2 ji5 jau5 jan4 lai4 taam3 nei5 gaa4
cards.english: Dr. Brown Bear said that someone can visit you.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: gam2 hai6 mai6 ho2 ji5 lai4 taam3 ngo5 aa3
cards.english: Then can Suzy come visit me?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: hai6 zeoi3 hou2 ge3 pang4 jau5
cards.english: Suzy is Peppa's best friend.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: gam2 dang2 ngo5 daa2 bei2 ge3 maa1 mi4 laa1
cards.english: Then let me call Suzy's mommy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: me1 nei5 hou2 aa3 zyu1 taai3 taai2
cards.english: Hello, Mrs. Pig?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: soeng2 wan2 aa3
cards.english: Peppa wants to see Suzy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: nei5 hou2 aa3
cards.english: Suzy, how are you?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: me1 nei5 hou2
cards.english: Oh, Peppa, hello?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 jau5 di1 m4 syu1 fuk6 aa3
cards.english: I'm feeling a bit unwell.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 faai3 min6 jau5 hou2 do1 hung4 dim2 aa3
cards.english: I have a lot of red spots on my face.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: nei5 tai2 zo2 ji1 sang1 mei6 aa3
cards.english: Have you seen a doctor yet?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.characters: 睇咗喇，棕熊醫生嚟過喇
cards.jyutping: tai2 zo2 laa3 zung1 hung4 ji1 sang1 lai4 gwo3 laa3
cards.english: Yes, Doctor Bear already came.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.characters: 佢話我有啲唔舒服同埋我好勇敢𡁜
cards.jyutping: keoi5 waa6 ngo5 jau5 di1 m4 syu1 fuk6 tung4 maai4 ngo5 hou2 jung5 gam2 wo5
cards.english: He said I'm a little unwell and that I'm very brave.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: nei5 zan1 hai6 hou2 m4 syu1 fuk6 aa1
cards.english: Are you really feeling unwell?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: hai6 aa3 m4 hai6 zaa3 beng6 gaa4
cards.english: Yes... I'm not faking it.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 jiu3 hai2 cong4 dou6 jau1 sik1 aa3
cards.english: I need to rest in bed.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.characters: 頭先棕熊醫生 仲畀咗啲好難飲嘅藥水我飲𠻹啊
cards.jyutping: tau4 sin1 zung1 hung4 ji1 sang1 zung6 bei2 zo2 di1 hou2 naan4 jam2 ge3 joek6 seoi2 ngo5 jam2 tim1 aa3
cards.english: Just now Dr. Brown Bear even gave me some really nasty medicine to drink.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: gam2 ngo5 gwo3 lai2 taam3 nei5 aa1 me1
cards.english: Then I'll come visit you, okay?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.characters: 我會着埋件護士衫嚟㗎
cards.jyutping: ngo5 wui6 zoek6 maai4 gin6 wu6 si6 saam1 lai4 gaa4
cards.english: I'll even put on my nurse outfit.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: lai4 dou3 taam3 laak3
cards.english: Suzy has come to visit Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: zoek6 zyu6 keoi5 tou3 wu6 si6 saam1
cards.english: Suzy is wearing her nurse outfit.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: tung4 jik6 dou1 jat1 cai4 lai4 zo2
cards.english: Danny and Rebecca have also come along.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: nei5 hou2 maa1 nei5 hou2 maa1
cards.english: -Peppa, how are you? -Peppa, how are you?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: daai6 gaa1 hou2 aa3
cards.english: Hello everyone.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: me1 nei5 gok3 dak1 dim2 aa3
cards.english: Okay, how do you feel?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 gok3 dak1 jau5 di1 m4 syu1 fuk6 aa3
cards.english: I'm feeling a bit unwell, Suzy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 jiu3 hai2 cong4 dou6 jau1 sik1 aa3
cards.english: I need to rest in bed.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.characters: 我哋有咩可以幫到你㗎？
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 jau5 me1 ho2 ji5 bong1 dou3 nei5 gaa4
cards.english: What can we do to help you?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.characters: 你哋可以拎杯橙汁畀我吖
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 ho2 ji5 ling1 bui1 caang2 zap1 bei2 ngo5 aa1
cards.english: Can you guys get me a glass of orange juice?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: hou2 aa1
cards.english: Okay.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: tai2 lok6 hou2 hoeng2 sau6 gam2 wo3
cards.english: Peppa, you seem to be enjoying yourself.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: m4 goi1
cards.english: Thank you, Suzy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: nei5 gok3 dak1 hou2 di1 mei6 aa3
cards.english: Do you feel any better?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: siu2 siu2 gam2 laa1
cards.english: A little bit.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.characters: 幫我問下媽咪我可唔可以食雪糕吖
cards.jyutping: bong1 ngo5 man6 haa6 maa1 mi4 ngo5 ho2 m4 ho2 ji5 sik6 syut3 gou1 aa1
cards.english: Ask Mommy if I can have some ice cream.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: zung6 jau5
cards.english: And also Rebecca.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.characters: 你可以喺花園度摘啲花嚟畀我嗎？
cards.jyutping: nei5 ho2 ji5 hai2 faa1 jyun4 dou6 zaak6 di1 faa1 lai4 bei2 ngo5 maa1
cards.english: Can you pick some flowers from the garden for me?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.characters: 棕熊醫生返嚟睇下Peppa有冇好轉
cards.jyutping: zung1 hung4 ji1 sang1 faan2 lai2 tai2 haa6 jau5 mou5 hou2 zyun2
cards.english: Dr. Brown Bear is back to check if Peppa is any better.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.characters: 太好喇，有個護士喺呢度𠻹喎
cards.jyutping: taai3 hou2 laa3 jau5 go3 wu6 si6 hai2 ne1 dou6 tim1 wo3
cards.english: Great, there's a nurse here too!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: beng6 jan4 cing4 fong3 dim2 aa3
cards.english: How is the patient doing?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 m4 hai6 zan1 ge3 wu6 si6 lai4 gaa4
cards.english: I'm not a real nurse.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6 baan6 ga3 zaa3
cards.english: I'm just pretending.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: jyun4 loi4 hai6 gam2 aa1
cards.english: Oh, I see?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.characters: 我親自睇下病人嘅情況得嗎？
cards.jyutping: ngo5 can1 zi6 tai2 haa6 beng6 jan4 ge3 cing4 fong3 dak1 maa1
cards.english: Can I check on the patient myself?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: hou2 aa3 m4 goi1
cards.english: Okay, thank you.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: dang2 ngo5 tai2 haa6 sin1
cards.english: Let me take a look first.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.characters: 你冇晒紅點喇喎，你完全好返晒喇
cards.jyutping: nei5 mou5 saai3 hung4 dim2 laa3 wo3 nei5 jyun4 cyun4 hou2 faan2 saai3 laa3
cards.english: You don't have any more red spots, you've completely recovered.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 m4 hai6 zung6 beng6 gam2 aa1
cards.english: Am I not still sick?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: nei5 gok3 dak1 dim2 aa3
cards.english: How do you feel?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.characters: 我覺得我應該喺牀度休息多一陣啦
cards.jyutping: ngo5 gok3 dak1 ngo5 jing1 goi1 hai2 cong4 dou6 jau1 sik1 do1 jat1 zan6 laa1
cards.english: I feel like I should rest in bed a bit longer.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.characters: 我想喺花園度用呢個波玩遊戲啊
cards.jyutping: ngo5 soeng2 hai2 faa1 jyun4 dou6 jung6 ni1 go3 bo1 waan2 jau4 hei3 aa3
cards.english: I want to play games with this ball in the garden!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: jau5 bin1 go3 soeng2 tung4 ngo5 waan2 aa3
cards.english: Who wants to play with me?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 jau6 waan2
cards.english: I'll play!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E25 Not Very Well［身體不適］
cards.characters: 睇下你吖，你已經完全好返晒喇
cards.jyutping: tai2 haa6 nei5 aa1 nei5 ji5 ging1 jyun4 cyun4 hou2 faan2 saai3 laa3
cards.english: Look at you, you've completely recovered!
